children.heading: Adjustment of base acreage for peanuts
children.label: a Adjustment of base acreage for peanuts
A
children.text: A conservation reserve contract entered into under section 1231 of the Food Security Act of 1985 () with respect to the farm expires or is voluntarily terminated, or was terminated or expired during the period beginning on , and ending on the date of enactment of this Act.16 U.S.C. 3831October 1, 2007

children.label: B
children.text: Cropland is released from coverage under a conservation reserve contract by the Secretary, or was released during the period beginning on , and ending on the date of enactment of this Act.October 1, 2007

children.label: C
children.text: The producer has eligible pulse crop acreage, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under .section 7911(a)(2) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: The producer has eligible oilseed acreage as the result of the Secretary designating additional oilseeds, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under .section 7911(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Special conservation reserve acreage payment rules
children.label: 2 Special conservation reserve acreage payment rules
children.text: For the crop year in which a base acres for peanuts adjustment under subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) is first made, the owner of the farm shall elect to receive either direct payments and counter-cyclical payments with respect to the acreage added to the farm under this subsection or a prorated payment under the conservation reserve contract, but not both.

children.heading: Prevention of excess base acres for peanuts
children.label: b Prevention of excess base acres for peanuts

children.heading: Required reduction
children.label: 1 Required reduction
children.text: If the sum of the base acres for peanuts for a farm, together with the acreage described in paragraph (2), exceeds the actual cropland acreage of the farm, the Secretary shall reduce the base acres for peanuts for the farm or the base acres for 1 or more covered commodities for the farm so that the sum of the base acres for peanuts and acreage described in paragraph (2) does not exceed the actual cropland acreage of the farm.

children.label: A
children.text: Any base acres for the farm for a covered commodity.

children.label: B
children.text: Any acreage on the farm enrolled in the conservation reserve program or wetlands reserve program under chapter 1 of subtitle D of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 3830

children.label: C
children.text: Any other acreage on the farm enrolled in a Federal conservation program for which payments are made in exchange for not producing an agricultural commodity on the acreage.

children.label: D
children.text: Any eligible pulse crop acreage, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under .section 7911(a)(2) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: If the Secretary designates additional oilseeds, any eligible oilseed acreage, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under .section 7911(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Selection of acres
children.label: 3 Selection of acres
children.text: The Secretary shall give the owner of the farm the opportunity to select the base acres for peanuts or the base acres for covered commodities against which the reduction required by paragraph (1) will be made.

children.heading: Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.label: 4 Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.text: In applying paragraph (1), the Secretary shall make an exception in the case of double cropping, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Coordinated application of requirements
children.label: 5 Coordinated application of requirements
children.text: The Secretary shall take into account when applying the requirements of this subsection.section 8711(b) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The owner of a farm may reduce, at any time, the base acres for peanuts for the farm.

children.heading: Effect of reduction
children.label: B Effect of reduction
children.text: A reduction under subparagraph (A) shall be permanent and made in a manner prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: remains devoted to commercial agricultural production; or

children.label: ii
children.text: is likely to be returned to the previous agricultural use.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: B Requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures to identify land described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Review and report
children.label: 3 Review and report
children.text: Each year, to ensure, to the maximum extent practicable, that payments are received only by producers, the Secretary shall submit to Congress a report that describes the results of the actions taken under paragraph (2).

children.heading: Treatment of farms with limited base acres
children.label: d Treatment of farms with limited base acres

children.heading: Prohibition on payments
children.label: 1 Prohibition on payments
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2) and notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, a producer on a farm may not receive direct payments, counter-cyclical payments, or average crop revenue election payments if the sum of the base acres of the farm is 10 acres or less, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: a socially disadvantaged farmer or rancher (as defined in ; orsection 2003(e) of this title1So in original. There probably should be a closing parenthesis after “title”.1

children.label: B
children.text: a limited resource farmer or rancher, as defined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Suspension of prohibition
children.label: 3 Suspension of prohibition
children.text: Paragraphs (1) and (2) shall not apply during the 2008 crop year.
